notes: convert_conversation.rs: three XxxResult::Error("...") variants are tool-call result error payloads fed back into the AI conversation (machine-consumed diagnostics, not human UI) -> telemetry_payload. task.rs 320/340/452: all .expect(...) -> panic_message. run_agents.rs: ChildSlot::Failed/RunAgentsResult::Denied reason strings (149/194/204/282/361) render to the user as agent-run failure reasons -> translated; kept run_id/opencode/Agent/harness identifiers; {} at 204 is SPAWN_TIMEOUT seconds (numeric) so translate around it. skill_manager.rs 540/550/551: report_error!/safe_warn! sinks -> telemetry_payload. display_chip.rs: 791/794 are RunAgentQuery prompt strings sent to the agent on the user's behalf (user-facing action intent) -> translated; 816 quota popup label -> translated (full-width period for positive notification); 510 action name format and 1873 echoed terminal message -> translated, {} placeholders preserved. display_map/mod.rs 110/114/132 (+dup 176/200): anyhow .context(...) internal invariant diagnostics, never a UI surface -> telemetry_payload. selections.rs 128/132/140/144/151/157: all .expect(...) -> panic_message. plugin/host/native/mod.rs: 39/44 .context()? error chains -> telemetry_payload; 71 .expect(...) -> panic_message. environments_page.rs: 85 page title -> translated; 206 '{} · {}' and 185 '{owner}/{repo}' are pure placeholder/separator shells (no translatable words) -> target = source; 1045 search_terms -> bilingual append. create_api_key_modal.rs 89/90/91/194/195: UI dropdown+label text -> translated. terminal_manager.rs: 868 on_pty_spawn_failed UI error and 1654/2033 show_persistent_toast -> translated (PowerShell/WSL kept); 929 .context() pty error chain -> telemetry_payload. open_in_warp.rs 53/64/66/83/84: banner UI text and button labels -> translated (Warp/Markdown/{display_name} preserved). snapshot.rs 255/258 .context()? + 260/261 safe_info! -> telemetry_payload. onboarding/src/bin/main.rs: dev/preview harness binary; 'Claude Sonnet' model identifier -> protocol_key; 'Finished/Skipped Onboarding' headers + 'SelectedSettings:' debug dumps (217 uses {:?}) -> test_fixture (non-shipped dev binary). slider.rs 37/38/39: /// doc fragments captured inside lazy_static! by macro scan -> extractor_false_positive_doc_comment; 218/304 .expect(...) -> panic_message.
